view_definition:
SELECT id AS event_id,
    actor_user AS user_id,
    old_values,
    new_values,
    meta,
    created_at,
    actor_user,
    entity AS source_table,
    action AS operation,
    entity,
    entity_id
   FROM audit_log;

SELECT f.id AS fund_id,
    f.name AS fund_name,
    fda.aum_date,
    fda.total_aum AS recorded_aum,
    COALESCE(pos_sum.position_total, (0)::numeric) AS calculated_aum,
    (fda.total_aum - COALESCE(pos_sum.position_total, (0)::numeric)) AS discrepancy,
    (abs((fda.total_aum - COALESCE(pos_sum.position_total, (0)::numeric))) > 0.01) AS has_discrepancy
   FROM ((funds f
     JOIN fund_daily_aum fda ON ((fda.fund_id = f.id)))
     LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ip.fund_id,
            sum(ip.current_value) AS position_total
           FROM (investor_positions ip
             JOIN profiles p ON ((p.id = ip.investor_id)))
          WHERE (p.account_type IS DISTINCT FROM 'fees_account'::account_type)
          GROUP BY ip.fund_id) pos_sum ON ((pos_sum.fund_id = f.id)))
  WHERE (fda.is_voided = false)
  ORDER BY f.name, fda.aum_date DESC;

SELECT f.id AS fund_id,
    f.name AS fund_name,
    f.code AS fund_code,
    fda.aum_date,
    fda.total_aum AS recorded_aum,
    COALESCE(pos_sum.total_positions, (0)::numeric) AS calculated_aum,
    (COALESCE(pos_sum.total_positions, (0)::numeric) - COALESCE(fda.total_aum, (0)::numeric)) AS discrepancy
   FROM ((funds f
     LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT fund_daily_aum.aum_date,
            fund_daily_aum.total_aum
           FROM fund_daily_aum
          WHERE ((fund_daily_aum.fund_id = f.id) AND (fund_daily_aum.is_voided = false))
          ORDER BY fund_daily_aum.aum_date DESC
         LIMIT 1) fda ON (true))
     LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT sum(investor_positions.current_value) AS total_positions
           FROM investor_positions
          WHERE (investor_positions.fund_id = f.id)) pos_sum ON (true))
  WHERE (abs((COALESCE(pos_sum.total_positions, (0)::numeric) - COALESCE(fda.total_aum, (0)::numeric))) > 0.01);

SELECT ia.id AS allocation_id,
    ia.source_investor_id,
    ((source_p.first_name || ' '::text) || source_p.last_name) AS source_investor_name,
    ia.ib_investor_id AS allocated_ib_id,
    ((ib_p.first_name || ' '::text) || ib_p.last_name) AS allocated_ib_name,
    source_p.ib_parent_id AS current_ib_id,
    ((current_ib_p.first_name || ' '::text) || current_ib_p.last_name) AS current_ib_name,
    ia.ib_fee_amount,
    ia.effective_date,
    (ia.ib_investor_id <> source_p.ib_parent_id) AS ib_changed_since_allocation,
    ((source_p.ib_parent_id IS NULL) AND (ia.ib_investor_id IS NOT NULL)) AS ib_removed
   FROM (((ib_allocations ia
     JOIN profiles source_p ON ((source_p.id = ia.source_investor_id)))
     LEFT JOIN profiles ib_p ON ((ib_p.id = ia.ib_investor_id)))
     LEFT JOIN profiles current_ib_p ON ((current_ib_p.id = source_p.ib_parent_id)))
  WHERE ((ia.is_voided = false) AND (((source_p.ib_parent_id IS NOT NULL) AND (ia.ib_investor_id <> source_p.ib_parent_id)) OR ((source_p.ib_parent_id IS NULL) AND (ia.ib_investor_id IS NOT NULL))));

SELECT ip.investor_id,
    ((p.first_name || ' '::text) || p.last_name) AS investor_name,
    ip.fund_id,
    f.code AS fund_code,
    ip.current_value AS position_value,
    COALESCE(ledger.net_balance, (0)::numeric) AS ledger_balance,
    (ip.current_value - COALESCE(ledger.net_balance, (0)::numeric)) AS discrepancy
   FROM (((investor_positions ip
     JOIN profiles p ON ((p.id = ip.investor_id)))
     JOIN funds f ON ((f.id = ip.fund_id)))
     LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT sum(
                CASE
                    WHEN (t.type = ANY (ARRAY['DEPOSIT'::tx_type, 'INTEREST'::tx_type, 'IB_CREDIT'::tx_type, 'YIELD'::tx_type, 'INTERNAL_CREDIT'::tx_type, 'FEE_CREDIT'::tx_type, 'ADJUSTMENT'::tx_type])) THEN t.amount
                    WHEN (t.type = ANY (ARRAY['WITHDRAWAL'::tx_type, 'FEE'::tx_type, 'INTERNAL_WITHDRAWAL'::tx_type])) THEN (- abs(t.amount))
                    ELSE (0)::numeric
                END) AS net_balance
           FROM transactions_v2 t
          WHERE ((t.investor_id = ip.investor_id) AND (t.fund_id = ip.fund_id) AND (t.is_voided = false))) ledger ON (true))
  WHERE (abs((ip.current_value - COALESCE(ledger.net_balance, (0)::numeric))) > 0.0001);

SELECT to_char((period_start)::timestamp with time zone, 'YYYY-MM'::text) AS summary_month,
    'USDT'::text AS asset_code,
    sum(fee_amount) AS total_fees_collected,
    sum((base_net_income + fee_amount)) AS total_gross_yield,
    sum(base_net_income) AS total_net_yield,
    count(DISTINCT investor_id) AS investor_count
   FROM fee_allocations fa
  WHERE (is_admin() AND (is_voided = false))
  GROUP BY (to_char((period_start)::timestamp with time zone, 'YYYY-MM'::text));

SELECT to_char((period_start)::timestamp with time zone, 'YYYY-MM'::text) AS period,
    fund_id,
    sum(fee_amount) AS total_fees
   FROM fee_allocations
  WHERE (is_admin() AND (is_voided = false))
  GROUP BY (to_char((period_start)::timestamp with time zone, 'YYYY-MM'::text)), fund_id;

SELECT ip.investor_id,
    ip.fund_id,
    ((p.first_name || ' '::text) || p.last_name) AS investor_name,
    f.name AS fund_name,
    ip.current_value AS position_value,
    COALESCE(tx_sum.ledger_total, (0)::numeric) AS ledger_total,
    (ip.current_value - COALESCE(tx_sum.ledger_total, (0)::numeric)) AS discrepancy,
    (abs((ip.current_value - COALESCE(tx_sum.ledger_total, (0)::numeric))) > 0.01) AS has_discrepancy
   FROM (((investor_positions ip
     JOIN profiles p ON ((p.id = ip.investor_id)))
     JOIN funds f ON ((f.id = ip.fund_id)))
     LEFT JOIN ( SELECT transactions_v2.investor_id,
            transactions_v2.fund_id,
            sum(
                CASE
                    WHEN (transactions_v2.type = ANY (ARRAY['DEPOSIT'::tx_type, 'YIELD'::tx_type, 'INTEREST'::tx_type, 'IB_CREDIT'::tx_type, 'FEE_CREDIT'::tx_type, 'INTERNAL_CREDIT'::tx_type, 'ADJUSTMENT'::tx_type, 'FEE'::tx_type])) THEN transactions_v2.amount
                    WHEN (transactions_v2.type = ANY (ARRAY['WITHDRAWAL'::tx_type, 'INTERNAL_WITHDRAWAL'::tx_type])) THEN (- abs(transactions_v2.amount))
                    ELSE (0)::numeric
                END) AS ledger_total
           FROM transactions_v2
          WHERE (transactions_v2.is_voided = false)
          GROUP BY transactions_v2.investor_id, transactions_v2.fund_id) tx_sum ON (((tx_sum.investor_id = ip.investor_id) AND (tx_sum.fund_id = ip.fund_id))));

SELECT ip.investor_id,
    ip.fund_id,
    ip.current_value AS position_value,
    COALESCE(t.tx_sum, (0)::numeric) AS transaction_sum,
    (ip.current_value - COALESCE(t.tx_sum, (0)::numeric)) AS difference
   FROM (investor_positions ip
     LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT sum(
                CASE
                    WHEN (transactions_v2.type = ANY (ARRAY['DEPOSIT'::tx_type, 'YIELD'::tx_type, 'INTEREST'::tx_type, 'IB_CREDIT'::tx_type, 'INTERNAL_CREDIT'::tx_type, 'FEE_CREDIT'::tx_type, 'ADJUSTMENT'::tx_type])) THEN transactions_v2.amount
                    WHEN (transactions_v2.type = ANY (ARRAY['WITHDRAWAL'::tx_type, 'FEE'::tx_type, 'INTERNAL_WITHDRAWAL'::tx_type])) THEN (- abs(transactions_v2.amount))
                    ELSE (0)::numeric
                END) AS tx_sum
           FROM transactions_v2
          WHERE ((transactions_v2.investor_id = ip.investor_id) AND (transactions_v2.fund_id = ip.fund_id) AND (transactions_v2.is_voided = false))) t ON (true))
  WHERE is_admin();

SELECT id,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    status,
    account_type,
    is_system_account,
    created_at
   FROM profiles;

SELECT ip.fund_id,
    f.code AS fund_code,
    ip.investor_id,
    ((p.first_name || ' '::text) || p.last_name) AS investor_name,
    p.account_type,
    ip.current_value AS position_value,
    ( SELECT fund_daily_aum.total_aum
           FROM fund_daily_aum
          WHERE ((fund_daily_aum.fund_id = ip.fund_id) AND (fund_daily_aum.is_voided = false))
          ORDER BY fund_daily_aum.aum_date DESC
         LIMIT 1) AS fund_aum,
        CASE
            WHEN (( SELECT fund_daily_aum.total_aum
               FROM fund_daily_aum
              WHERE ((fund_daily_aum.fund_id = ip.fund_id) AND (fund_daily_aum.is_voided = false))
              ORDER BY fund_daily_aum.aum_date DESC
             LIMIT 1) > (0)::numeric) THEN round(((ip.current_value / ( SELECT fund_daily_aum.total_aum
               FROM fund_daily_aum
              WHERE ((fund_daily_aum.fund_id = ip.fund_id) AND (fund_daily_aum.is_voided = false))
              ORDER BY fund_daily_aum.aum_date DESC
             LIMIT 1)) * (100)::numeric), 2)
            ELSE (0)::numeric
        END AS ownership_pct,
        CASE
            WHEN ((ip.current_value / NULLIF(( SELECT fund_daily_aum.total_aum
               FROM fund_daily_aum
              WHERE ((fund_daily_aum.fund_id = ip.fund_id) AND (fund_daily_aum.is_voided = false))
              ORDER BY fund_daily_aum.aum_date DESC
             LIMIT 1), (0)::numeric)) > 0.5) THEN 'CRITICAL'::text
            WHEN ((ip.current_value / NULLIF(( SELECT fund_daily_aum.total_aum
               FROM fund_daily_aum
              WHERE ((fund_daily_aum.fund_id = ip.fund_id) AND (fund_daily_aum.is_voided = false))
              ORDER BY fund_daily_aum.aum_date DESC
             LIMIT 1), (0)::numeric)) > 0.3) THEN 'HIGH'::text
            WHEN ((ip.current_value / NULLIF(( SELECT fund_daily_aum.total_aum
               FROM fund_daily_aum
              WHERE ((fund_daily_aum.fund_id = ip.fund_id) AND (fund_daily_aum.is_voided = false))
              ORDER BY fund_daily_aum.aum_date DESC
             LIMIT 1), (0)::numeric)) > 0.2) THEN 'MEDIUM'::text
            ELSE 'LOW'::text
        END AS concentration_level
   FROM ((investor_positions ip
     JOIN profiles p ON ((p.id = ip.investor_id)))
     JOIN funds f ON ((f.id = ip.fund_id)))
  WHERE ((ip.current_value > (0)::numeric) AND (p.account_type = 'investor'::account_type))
  ORDER BY
        CASE
            WHEN (( SELECT fund_daily_aum.total_aum
               FROM fund_daily_aum
              WHERE ((fund_daily_aum.fund_id = ip.fund_id) AND (fund_daily_aum.is_voided = false))
              ORDER BY fund_daily_aum.aum_date DESC
             LIMIT 1) > (0)::numeric) THEN round(((ip.current_value / ( SELECT fund_daily_aum.total_aum
               FROM fund_daily_aum
              WHERE ((fund_daily_aum.fund_id = ip.fund_id) AND (fund_daily_aum.is_voided = false))
              ORDER BY fund_daily_aum.aum_date DESC
             LIMIT 1)) * (100)::numeric), 2)
            ELSE (0)::numeric
        END DESC;

SELECT reference_id,
    count(*) AS duplicate_count,
    array_agg(id ORDER BY created_at) AS transaction_ids,
    array_agg(tx_date ORDER BY created_at) AS tx_dates,
    array_agg(type ORDER BY created_at) AS types,
    array_agg(amount ORDER BY created_at) AS amounts,
    min(created_at) AS first_created,
    max(created_at) AS last_created
   FROM transactions_v2
  WHERE ((reference_id IS NOT NULL) AND (reference_id <> ''::text) AND (is_voided = false))
  GROUP BY reference_id
 HAVING (count(*) > 1)
  ORDER BY (count(*)) DESC, (min(created_at)) DESC;

SELECT fa.id AS allocation_id,
    fa.distribution_id,
    fa.investor_id,
    fa.fund_id,
    fa.fee_amount,
    fa.period_start,
    fa.period_end,
    fa.purpose,
        CASE
            WHEN (yd.id IS NULL) THEN 'missing_distribution'::text
            WHEN (p.id IS NULL) THEN 'missing_investor'::text
            WHEN (f.id IS NULL) THEN 'missing_fund'::text
            ELSE 'unknown'::text
        END AS issue_type
   FROM (((fee_allocations fa
     LEFT JOIN yield_distributions yd ON ((fa.distribution_id = yd.id)))
     LEFT JOIN profiles p ON ((fa.investor_id = p.id)))
     LEFT JOIN funds f ON ((fa.fund_id = f.id)))
  WHERE ((fa.is_voided = false) AND ((yd.id IS NULL) OR (p.id IS NULL) OR (f.id IS NULL)));

SELECT fa.id,
    fa.distribution_id,
    fa.fund_id,
    fa.investor_id,
    fa.fees_account_id,
    fa.period_start,
    fa.period_end,
    fa.purpose,
    fa.base_net_income,
    fa.fee_percentage,
    fa.fee_amount,
    fa.credit_transaction_id,
    fa.debit_transaction_id,
    fa.created_at,
    fa.created_by,
    fa.is_voided,
    fa.voided_at,
    fa.voided_by
   FROM (fee_allocations fa
     LEFT JOIN yield_distributions yd ON ((fa.distribution_id = yd.id)))
  WHERE ((yd.id IS NULL) OR (yd.status = 'voided'::text));

WITH fund_validation AS (
         SELECT f.id AS fund_id,
            f.name AS fund_name,
            f.asset,
            COALESCE(( SELECT fund_daily_aum.total_aum
                   FROM fund_daily_aum
                  WHERE ((fund_daily_aum.fund_id = f.id) AND (fund_daily_aum.is_voided = false))
                  ORDER BY fund_daily_aum.aum_date DESC
                 LIMIT 1), (0)::numeric) AS recorded_aum,
            COALESCE(( SELECT sum(investor_positions.current_value) AS sum
                   FROM investor_positions
                  WHERE (investor_positions.fund_id = f.id)), (0)::numeric) AS actual_positions,
            (COALESCE(( SELECT count(*) AS count
                   FROM investor_positions
                  WHERE ((investor_positions.fund_id = f.id) AND (investor_positions.current_value > (0)::numeric))), (0)::bigint))::integer AS active_investors
           FROM funds f
          WHERE (f.status = 'active'::fund_status)
        )
 SELECT fund_id,
    fund_name,
    asset,
    recorded_aum,
    actual_positions,
    active_investors,
    (recorded_aum - actual_positions) AS discrepancy,
        CASE
            WHEN ((recorded_aum = (0)::numeric) AND (actual_positions = (0)::numeric)) THEN (0)::numeric
            WHEN (recorded_aum = (0)::numeric) THEN (100)::numeric
            ELSE round(((abs((recorded_aum - actual_positions)) / NULLIF(recorded_aum, (0)::numeric)) * (100)::numeric), 2)
        END AS discrepancy_pct,
        CASE
            WHEN (abs((recorded_aum - actual_positions)) <= 0.01) THEN 'OK'::text
            WHEN ((recorded_aum = (0)::numeric) AND (actual_positions = (0)::numeric)) THEN 'EMPTY'::text
            WHEN (((abs((recorded_aum - actual_positions)) / NULLIF(GREATEST(recorded_aum, actual_positions), (0)::numeric)) * (100)::numeric) <= (1)::numeric) THEN 'OK'::text
            WHEN (((abs((recorded_aum - actual_positions)) / NULLIF(GREATEST(recorded_aum, actual_positions), (0)::numeric)) * (100)::numeric) <= (5)::numeric) THEN 'WARNING'::text
            ELSE 'CRITICAL'::text
        END AS status
   FROM fund_validation
  ORDER BY
        CASE
            WHEN (((abs((recorded_aum - actual_positions)) / NULLIF(GREATEST(recorded_aum, actual_positions), (0)::numeric)) * (100)::numeric) > (5)::numeric) THEN 1
            WHEN (((abs((recorded_aum - actual_positions)) / NULLIF(GREATEST(recorded_aum, actual_positions), (0)::numeric)) * (100)::numeric) > (1)::numeric) THEN 2
            ELSE 3
        END, fund_name;

SELECT ia.id AS allocation_id,
    ia.source_investor_id,
    ia.ib_investor_id,
    ia.distribution_id,
    ia.ib_fee_amount,
    ia.effective_date,
    ia.payout_status,
        CASE
            WHEN (sp.id IS NULL) THEN 'MISSING_SOURCE_PROFILE'::text
            WHEN (ip.id IS NULL) THEN 'MISSING_IB_PROFILE'::text
            WHEN ((ia.distribution_id IS NOT NULL) AND (yd.id IS NULL)) THEN 'MISSING_DISTRIBUTION'::text
            ELSE 'OK'::text
        END AS issue_type
   FROM (((ib_allocations ia
     LEFT JOIN profiles sp ON ((sp.id = ia.source_investor_id)))
     LEFT JOIN profiles ip ON ((ip.id = ia.ib_investor_id)))
     LEFT JOIN yield_distributions yd ON ((yd.id = ia.distribution_id)))
  WHERE (is_admin() AND (ia.is_voided = false) AND ((sp.id IS NULL) OR (ip.id IS NULL) OR ((ia.distribution_id IS NOT NULL) AND (yd.id IS NULL))));

SELECT p.id AS investor_id,
    concat(p.first_name, ' ', p.last_name) AS name,
    p.email,
    p.status,
    p.kyc_status,
    count(DISTINCT ip.fund_id) AS funds_invested,
    COALESCE(sum(ip.current_value), (0)::numeric) AS total_value,
    COALESCE(sum(ip.cost_basis), (0)::numeric) AS total_invested,
    COALESCE(sum(ip.unrealized_pnl), (0)::numeric) AS total_unrealized_pnl,
    COALESCE(sum(ip.realized_pnl), (0)::numeric) AS total_realized_pnl,
    COALESCE(sum(ip.mgmt_fees_paid), (0)::numeric) AS total_mgmt_fees,
    COALESCE(sum(ip.perf_fees_paid), (0)::numeric) AS total_perf_fees,
    min(ip.last_transaction_date) AS first_investment_date,
    max(ip.last_transaction_date) AS last_activity_date
   FROM (profiles p
     LEFT JOIN investor_positions ip ON ((p.id = ip.investor_id)))
  WHERE ((p.id = auth.uid()) OR is_admin())
  GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name, p.email, p.status, p.kyc_status;

SELECT ip.investor_id,
    ip.fund_id,
    f.name AS fund_name,
    ip.cost_basis,
    ip.current_value,
    ip.unrealized_pnl,
    ip.realized_pnl,
        CASE
            WHEN (ip.cost_basis > (0)::numeric) THEN (((ip.current_value - ip.cost_basis) / ip.cost_basis) * (100)::numeric)
            ELSE (0)::numeric
        END AS itd_return_pct
   FROM (investor_positions ip
     JOIN funds f ON ((f.id = ip.fund_id)))
  WHERE (is_admin() OR (ip.investor_id = auth.uid()));

WITH position_totals AS (
         SELECT ip.investor_id,
            ip.fund_id,
            ip.current_value AS position_value,
            f.asset,
            f.name AS fund_name
           FROM (investor_positions ip
             JOIN funds f ON ((f.id = ip.fund_id)))
          WHERE (ip.current_value <> (0)::numeric)
        ), ledger_totals AS (
         SELECT t.investor_id,
            t.fund_id,
            sum(
                CASE
                    WHEN (t.type = ANY (ARRAY['DEPOSIT'::tx_type, 'INTEREST'::tx_type, 'YIELD'::tx_type, 'IB_CREDIT'::tx_type, 'INTERNAL_CREDIT'::tx_type, 'FEE_CREDIT'::tx_type, 'ADJUSTMENT'::tx_type])) THEN t.amount
                    WHEN (t.type = ANY (ARRAY['WITHDRAWAL'::tx_type, 'FEE'::tx_type, 'INTERNAL_WITHDRAWAL'::tx_type])) THEN (- abs(t.amount))
                    ELSE (0)::numeric
                END) AS ledger_balance
           FROM transactions_v2 t
          WHERE (t.is_voided = false)
          GROUP BY t.investor_id, t.fund_id
        )
 SELECT COALESCE(p.investor_id, l.investor_id) AS investor_id,
    COALESCE(p.fund_id, l.fund_id) AS fund_id,
    p.fund_name,
    p.asset,
    COALESCE(p.position_value, (0)::numeric) AS position_value,
    COALESCE(l.ledger_balance, (0)::numeric) AS ledger_balance,
    abs((COALESCE(p.position_value, (0)::numeric) - COALESCE(l.ledger_balance, (0)::numeric))) AS difference,
        CASE
            WHEN (abs((COALESCE(p.position_value, (0)::numeric) - COALESCE(l.ledger_balance, (0)::numeric))) > 0.00000001) THEN 'MISMATCH'::text
            ELSE 'OK'::text
        END AS status,
        CASE
            WHEN (abs((COALESCE(p.position_value, (0)::numeric) - COALESCE(l.ledger_balance, (0)::numeric))) > (1)::numeric) THEN 'critical'::text
            WHEN (abs((COALESCE(p.position_value, (0)::numeric) - COALESCE(l.ledger_balance, (0)::numeric))) > 0.00000001) THEN 'warning'::text
            ELSE 'ok'::text
        END AS severity
   FROM (position_totals p
     FULL JOIN ledger_totals l ON (((p.investor_id = l.investor_id) AND (p.fund_id = l.fund_id))))
  WHERE (abs((COALESCE(p.position_value, (0)::numeric) - COALESCE(l.ledger_balance, (0)::numeric))) > 0.00000001);

SELECT f.id AS fund_id,
    f.code,
    f.asset,
    ( SELECT fund_daily_aum.total_aum
           FROM fund_daily_aum
          WHERE ((fund_daily_aum.fund_id = f.id) AND (fund_daily_aum.is_voided = false))
          ORDER BY fund_daily_aum.aum_date DESC
         LIMIT 1) AS current_aum,
    COALESCE(sum(wr.requested_amount) FILTER (WHERE (wr.status = 'pending'::withdrawal_status)), (0)::numeric) AS pending_amount,
    COALESCE(sum(wr.requested_amount) FILTER (WHERE (wr.status = 'approved'::withdrawal_status)), (0)::numeric) AS approved_amount,
    COALESCE(sum(wr.requested_amount) FILTER (WHERE (wr.status = 'processing'::withdrawal_status)), (0)::numeric) AS processing_amount,
    COALESCE(sum(wr.requested_amount) FILTER (WHERE (wr.status = ANY (ARRAY['pending'::withdrawal_status, 'approved'::withdrawal_status, 'processing'::withdrawal_status]))), (0)::numeric) AS total_pending,
        CASE
            WHEN (( SELECT fund_daily_aum.total_aum
               FROM fund_daily_aum
              WHERE ((fund_daily_aum.fund_id = f.id) AND (fund_daily_aum.is_voided = false))
              ORDER BY fund_daily_aum.aum_date DESC
             LIMIT 1) > (0)::numeric) THEN round(((COALESCE(sum(wr.requested_amount) FILTER (WHERE (wr.status = ANY (ARRAY['pending'::withdrawal_status, 'approved'::withdrawal_status, 'processing'::withdrawal_status]))), (0)::numeric) / ( SELECT fund_daily_aum.total_aum
               FROM fund_daily_aum
              WHERE ((fund_daily_aum.fund_id = f.id) AND (fund_daily_aum.is_voided = false))
              ORDER BY fund_daily_aum.aum_date DESC
             LIMIT 1)) * (100)::numeric), 2)
            ELSE (0)::numeric
        END AS withdrawal_pressure_pct,
        CASE
            WHEN ((COALESCE(sum(wr.requested_amount) FILTER (WHERE (wr.status = ANY (ARRAY['pending'::withdrawal_status, 'approved'::withdrawal_status, 'processing'::withdrawal_status]))), (0)::numeric) / NULLIF(( SELECT fund_daily_aum.total_aum
               FROM fund_daily_aum
              WHERE ((fund_daily_aum.fund_id = f.id) AND (fund_daily_aum.is_voided = false))
              ORDER BY fund_daily_aum.aum_date DESC
             LIMIT 1), (0)::numeric)) > 0.3) THEN 'HIGH'::text
            WHEN ((COALESCE(sum(wr.requested_amount) FILTER (WHERE (wr.status = ANY (ARRAY['pending'::withdrawal_status, 'approved'::withdrawal_status, 'processing'::withdrawal_status]))), (0)::numeric) / NULLIF(( SELECT fund_daily_aum.total_aum
               FROM fund_daily_aum
              WHERE ((fund_daily_aum.fund_id = f.id) AND (fund_daily_aum.is_voided = false))
              ORDER BY fund_daily_aum.aum_date DESC
             LIMIT 1), (0)::numeric)) > 0.15) THEN 'MEDIUM'::text
            ELSE 'LOW'::text
        END AS risk_level
   FROM (funds f
     LEFT JOIN withdrawal_requests wr ON ((wr.fund_id = f.id)))
  WHERE (f.status = 'active'::fund_status)
  GROUP BY f.id, f.code, f.asset;

SELECT ip.investor_id,
    f.name AS fund_name,
    ip.current_value AS last_reported_balance,
    (0)::numeric AS recent_deposits,
    (0)::numeric AS recent_withdrawals,
    ip.current_value AS live_balance
   FROM (investor_positions ip
     JOIN funds f ON ((ip.fund_id = f.id)))
  WHERE (is_admin() OR (ip.investor_id = auth.uid()));

SELECT ip.investor_id,
    ip.fund_id,
    ip.current_value,
    ip.shares,
    ip.last_transaction_date,
    ip.updated_at,
        CASE
            WHEN ((p.id IS NULL) AND (f.id IS NULL)) THEN 'BOTH_MISSING'::text
            WHEN (p.id IS NULL) THEN 'INVESTOR_MISSING'::text
            WHEN (f.id IS NULL) THEN 'FUND_MISSING'::text
            ELSE 'VALID'::text
        END AS orphan_type,
    (p.id IS NULL) AS investor_missing,
    (f.id IS NULL) AS fund_missing
   FROM ((investor_positions ip
     LEFT JOIN profiles p ON ((ip.investor_id = p.id)))
     LEFT JOIN funds f ON ((ip.fund_id = f.id)))
  WHERE ((p.id IS NULL) OR (f.id IS NULL));

SELECT t.id,
    t.fund_id,
    t.tx_date,
    t.value_date,
    t.asset,
    t.amount,
    t.type,
    t.balance_before,
    t.balance_after,
    t.tx_hash,
    t.reference_id,
    t.notes,
    t.approved_by,
    t.approved_at,
    t.created_by,
    t.created_at,
    t.fund_class,
    t.investor_id,
    t.purpose,
    t.source,
    t.is_system_generated,
    t.visibility_scope,
    t.transfer_id,
    t.distribution_id,
    t.correction_id,
    t.tx_subtype,
    t.is_voided,
    t.voided_at,
    t.voided_by,
    t.void_reason
   FROM (transactions_v2 t
     LEFT JOIN investor_positions ip ON (((t.investor_id = ip.investor_id) AND (t.fund_id = ip.fund_id))))
  WHERE ((ip.investor_id IS NULL) AND (t.investor_id IS NOT NULL) AND (NOT t.is_voided));

SELECT id,
    user_id,
    role,
    created_at
   FROM user_roles ur
  WHERE (NOT (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM profiles p
          WHERE (p.id = ur.user_id))));

SELECT sp.id AS period_id,
    sp.year,
    sp.month,
    f.id AS fund_id,
    f.code AS fund_code,
    f.name AS fund_name,
    fps.id AS snapshot_id,
    fps.is_locked AS snapshot_locked,
    sp.status AS period_status,
        CASE
            WHEN (fps.id IS NULL) THEN 'MISSING_SNAPSHOT'::text
            WHEN ((fps.is_locked = false) AND (sp.status = 'finalized'::text)) THEN 'UNLOCKED_BUT_FINALIZED'::text
            WHEN ((fps.is_locked = true) AND (sp.status = 'draft'::text)) THEN 'LOCKED_BUT_DRAFT'::text
            ELSE 'OK'::text
        END AS issue_type,
        CASE
            WHEN (fps.id IS NULL) THEN 'Fund period snapshot missing for active fund'::text
            WHEN ((fps.is_locked = false) AND (sp.status = 'finalized'::text)) THEN 'Snapshot unlocked but period is finalized'::text
            WHEN ((fps.is_locked = true) AND (sp.status = 'draft'::text)) THEN 'Snapshot locked but period is still draft'::text
            ELSE 'No issue'::text
        END AS issue_description
   FROM ((statement_periods sp
     CROSS JOIN funds f)
     LEFT JOIN fund_period_snapshot fps ON (((fps.period_id = sp.id) AND (fps.fund_id = f.id))))
  WHERE (is_admin() AND (f.status = 'active'::fund_status) AND ((fps.id IS NULL) OR ((fps.is_locked = false) AND (sp.status = 'finalized'::text)) OR ((fps.is_locked = true) AND (sp.status = 'draft'::text))));

SELECT ip.investor_id,
    ip.fund_id,
    ip.current_value AS position_value,
    COALESCE(sum(t.amount) FILTER (WHERE (NOT t.is_voided)), (0)::numeric) AS transaction_sum,
    (ip.current_value - COALESCE(sum(t.amount) FILTER (WHERE (NOT t.is_voided)), (0)::numeric)) AS variance
   FROM (investor_positions ip
     LEFT JOIN transactions_v2 t ON (((t.investor_id = ip.investor_id) AND (t.fund_id = ip.fund_id))))
  GROUP BY ip.investor_id, ip.fund_id, ip.current_value
 HAVING (abs((ip.current_value - COALESCE(sum(t.amount) FILTER (WHERE (NOT t.is_voided)), (0)::numeric))) > 0.01);

SELECT n.nspname AS schema_name,
    p.proname AS function_name,
    p.prosecdef AS is_security_definer,
        CASE
            WHEN ((p.proconfig IS NOT NULL) AND ('search_path=public'::text = ANY (p.proconfig))) THEN true
            ELSE false
        END AS has_search_path,
    p.proconfig AS config,
    pg_get_function_identity_arguments(p.oid) AS arguments,
    obj_description(p.oid, 'pg_proc'::name) AS description
   FROM (pg_proc p
     JOIN pg_namespace n ON ((p.pronamespace = n.oid)))
  WHERE ((n.nspname = 'public'::name) AND (p.prosecdef = true))
  ORDER BY p.proname;

SELECT t.id AS transaction_id,
    t.investor_id,
    t.fund_id,
    t.type AS transaction_type,
    t.amount,
    t.tx_date,
    t.distribution_id,
    t.purpose,
        CASE
            WHEN (yd.id IS NULL) THEN 'MISSING_DISTRIBUTION'::text
            WHEN (yd.status = 'voided'::text) THEN 'VOIDED_DISTRIBUTION'::text
            ELSE 'OK'::text
        END AS issue_type
   FROM (transactions_v2 t
     LEFT JOIN yield_distributions yd ON ((yd.id = t.distribution_id)))
  WHERE (is_admin() AND (t.distribution_id IS NOT NULL) AND (t.is_voided = false) AND ((yd.id IS NULL) OR (yd.status = 'voided'::text)));

SELECT id,
    fund_id,
    effective_date,
    gross_yield,
    net_yield,
    total_fees,
    total_ib,
    COALESCE(dust_amount, (0)::numeric) AS dust_amount,
    (((net_yield + total_fees) + total_ib) + COALESCE(dust_amount, (0)::numeric)) AS calculated_total,
    (gross_yield - (((net_yield + total_fees) + total_ib) + COALESCE(dust_amount, (0)::numeric))) AS variance,
    (abs((gross_yield - (((net_yield + total_fees) + total_ib) + COALESCE(dust_amount, (0)::numeric)))) < 0.0000000001) AS is_conserved,
        CASE
            WHEN (abs((gross_yield - (((net_yield + total_fees) + total_ib) + COALESCE(dust_amount, (0)::numeric)))) < 0.0000000001) THEN 'PASS'::text
            ELSE ('FAIL - VARIANCE: '::text || (round((gross_yield - (((net_yield + total_fees) + total_ib) + COALESCE(dust_amount, (0)::numeric))), 12))::text)
        END AS conservation_status,
    status,
    created_at
   FROM yield_distributions
  WHERE ((voided_at IS NULL) AND (status = 'applied'::text))
  ORDER BY
        CASE
            WHEN (abs((gross_yield - (((net_yield + total_fees) + total_ib) + COALESCE(dust_amount, (0)::numeric)))) >= 0.0000000001) THEN 0
            ELSE 1
        END, effective_date DESC;

SELECT id,
    request_id,
    action,
    actor_id,
    details,
    created_at
   FROM withdrawal_audit_logs;

SELECT wr.id,
    wr.investor_id,
    wr.fund_id,
    f.name AS fund_name,
    wr.requested_amount AS amount,
    wr.status,
    wr.request_date AS requested_at,
    wr.processed_at,
    wr.notes
   FROM (withdrawal_requests wr
     JOIN funds f ON ((f.id = wr.fund_id)))
  WHERE (is_admin() OR (wr.investor_id = auth.uid()));

SELECT yd.id AS distribution_id,
    yd.fund_id,
    f.code AS fund_code,
    yd.effective_date,
    yd.gross_yield,
    COALESCE(fee_sum.total_fees, (0)::numeric) AS calculated_fees,
    COALESCE(ib_sum.total_ib, (0)::numeric) AS calculated_ib,
    COALESCE(((yd.summary_json ->> 'total_net_interest'::text))::numeric, (0)::numeric) AS net_to_investors,
    (yd.gross_yield - COALESCE(((yd.summary_json ->> 'total_net_interest'::text))::numeric, (0)::numeric)) AS expected_deductions,
    (COALESCE(fee_sum.total_fees, (0)::numeric) + COALESCE(ib_sum.total_ib, (0)::numeric)) AS actual_deductions,
    abs(((yd.gross_yield - COALESCE(((yd.summary_json ->> 'total_net_interest'::text))::numeric, (0)::numeric)) - (COALESCE(fee_sum.total_fees, (0)::numeric) + COALESCE(ib_sum.total_ib, (0)::numeric)))) AS conservation_error
   FROM (((yield_distributions yd
     LEFT JOIN funds f ON ((f.id = yd.fund_id)))
     LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT COALESCE(sum(fa.fee_amount), (0)::numeric) AS total_fees
           FROM fee_allocations fa
          WHERE ((fa.distribution_id = yd.id) AND (fa.is_voided = false))) fee_sum ON (true))
     LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT COALESCE(sum(ia.ib_fee_amount), (0)::numeric) AS total_ib
           FROM ib_allocations ia
          WHERE ((ia.distribution_id = yd.id) AND (ia.is_voided = false))) ib_sum ON (true))
  WHERE (is_admin() AND (yd.voided_at IS NULL) AND (yd.status = 'applied'::text) AND (abs(((yd.gross_yield - COALESCE(((yd.summary_json ->> 'total_net_interest'::text))::numeric, (0)::numeric)) - (COALESCE(fee_sum.total_fees, (0)::numeric) + COALESCE(ib_sum.total_ib, (0)::numeric)))) > 0.0001));
